mig.gas_type: C25 (75% Argon / 25% CO2) for mild steel, Stainless Tri-Mix for stainless steel
mig.additional_connections: Connect MIG gun cable to wire feed mechanism, connect wire feed control cable inside welder

flux_cored.additional_connections: Connect MIG gun cable to wire feed mechanism, connect wire feed control cable inside welder

tig.additional_connections: Connect foot pedal cable through hole on welder front to foot pedal socket inside machine, connect shielding gas hose from TIG torch to regulator outlet

stick.additional_connections: Leave wire feed power cable disconnected

spool_gun.additional_connections: Connect spool gun cable connector to wire feed mechanism, connect wire feed control cable inside welder, connect gas hose to spool gun gas outlet
